messages.reports.title: %s Analytics Report
messages.reports.received_because: You received this email because you have analytics reports enabled.
messages.auth.password_reset.heading: Reset Password
messages.auth.password_reset.body: We received a request to reset the password for your HitKeep analytics instance.
messages.auth.magic_link.heading: Finish sign-in
messages.auth.magic_link.body: We received a request to finish signing in to your HitKeep account.
messages.auth.magic_link.expires: This sign-in link expires in %d minutes.
messages.invite.user.heading: You've been invited!
messages.invite.user.body1: %s has invited you to join %s on HitKeep.
messages.invite.user.body2: Click the button below to accept the invitation and set up your account.
messages.invite.team.heading: You're invited to join a team
messages.invite.team.body1: %s has invited you to join %s on HitKeep as %s.
messages.invite.team.requires_setup: You'll need to create a password to activate your account before you can access the team.
messages.invite.team.help_new: Create a password to activate your account and join this team.
messages.invite.team.help_existing: Sign in to access your team workspace.
messages.signup.verify.heading: Verify your email
messages.signup.verify.body: You're one step away from creating your %s workspace on HitKeep.
messages.subject.user_invite: You've been invited to join %s on HitKeep
messages.subject.team_invite_new: You're invited to join %s on HitKeep
messages.subject.team_invite_existing: You've been added to %s on HitKeep
